title: Company Names Tribunal decision: Israel BASF (China) Agriculture Technology Ltd
body: "Application number 5460  Applicant BASF SE and 39 others objected to the name used by Israel BASF (China) Agriculture Technology Ltd under the Companies Act 2006.  This decision was undefended. ‘Undefended’ refers to decisions where there has been no defence in response to the application to the Company Names Tribunal. "
